finding: check_skill_metadata spawns gen_skill_metadata.py which spawns 6 more python3 --schema subprocesses, each re-importing am_i_done/budget_manager and re-running git rev-parse at import; ~7 spawns + ~6 git forks per gate run x CI matrix.
recommendation: Import CLI_SPEC dicts directly instead of shelling out; memoize git rev-parse via env.

finding: check_markdown_schema re-runs glob per schema/exclude per matched file; recursive .work/reviews/** glob re-walks per file. O(files * exclude_globs * walk).
recommendation: Precompute matched/excluded sets once; test membership per file.
Parse once in main() or functools.cache.

finding: check_budget spawns budget_manager twice, each re-forking git rev-parse.
recommendation: Import budget_manager in-process or single combined invocation.

finding: events.jsonl grows one line per gate run + per hook event, no cap; insights tooling scans whole file.
